title: Luffy Refuses to Let the Island Fall
description: On pages 12–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is luffy refuses to let the island fall.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy refuses to let the island fall, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The kraken's still bigger, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Still not as big as the kraken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Very well. Leave it to me.

summary: Luffy Refuses to Let the Island Fall. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
